channel.title: Mental
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Mental, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Full-Fat Dairy Consumption Linked to Potential Reduction in Dementia Risk
item.description: New research suggests that full-fat dairy products, once widely discouraged, may offer protective benefits for brain health and cognitive function.

item.title: Study: Adjusting Your Walking Pace May Boost Energy Throughout the Day
item.description: Research indicates that a simple modification to walking speed could help people feel more physically capable and energized across the day.

item.title: The Nocebo Effect: Why Expectations Can Influence How Patients Feel
item.description: Psychiatrists say patient expectations about a drug's side effects may shape physical outcomes more significantly than previously understood.

item.title: Living with Lymphoma: One Person's Path Toward a Renewed Sense of Self
item.description: A personal account of adapting to a rare cancer diagnosis and finding meaning and personal growth in the process of living with a chronic illness.
